reviews.review_description:
Could not move in any direction. 
No weapon to grab
FAIL

developer_response.body: Look down, please, and you will find the solution. In addition, in this game you do not need to move.

reviews.review_description:
I am not a gamer, usually. I didn't grow up with computers or VR, so call me a newbie. I got to the game world, standing at an intersection. I can see my hands but there's nothing in them and nothing around me except streets in different directions and buildings. I couldn't move any of the usual ways. So, what are you supposed to do? I'm tired of these games assuming that we're going to figure out how to play through osmosis! No instructions, no aims, no way to figure out how to find them. I did find a menu, of sorts, on my left wrist, and it showed a demo mode which did nothing but change it to evening. I'm not sure what it was supposed to demo. Nothing else did anything from that screen.

I get it, you're used to gamers. But why not give the rest of us a chance to try your stuff? I'm tired of getting into an app only to find that there's nothing explaining objectives, how to's, or anything else.

developer_response.body: If you need help, feel free to contact us, we will help you. By the way, the narration says you need a weapon. Look down and you will find the solution. Good luck!
